= TODO =
This is the general TODO page. Put priority tasks here you want someone to do or tasks you are performing which will take time.
Add tasks in the following format:

```<code> </code>``
==Category==
* Task
** Subtask
</code>
<pre>

Also, it would be nice maintaining some kind of priority order. Of course, once you start working on something you mark it as being under work, and remove it once it's done.

== Game/Modification ==
Currently it's needed to create new pages for mods and settings. Also maybe some clan war rules something, anything to do with LieroX, don't be shy.

== Community ==
* Write LXA article (Anubis: Commenced)
** Get facts/dates correct. More in Talk:Liero Xtreme Alliance
* Write article on FileBase.
* Write article on the Gaming Universe.

== Levels ==
* Changes from older versions of levels (LFr, for instance)

Wanted pages

== User Pages ==
* User pages should be made in your profile, not under a new page. You have a User|Username tag juts for that. ````
</pre>

[[Category:Moderation]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721115338/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/TODO -->
